document: NameSilo Registrar Abuse Investigation — Forensic Evidence Manifest
investigator_note: This manifest provides SHA-256 integrity hashes for all primary evidence files. Any modification of the data files will result in a different hash, invalidating the evidence.

infrastructure: AWS Lambda: namesilo-scanner function, us-east-1, up to 400 concurrent

classification_criteria.active_with_forms: HTML forms present — login/credential harvesting pages
classification_criteria.parking: Known parking page patterns (namesilo, godaddy, sedo, etc.)
classification_criteria.dead: Connection timeout, refused, or DNS failure within 5s

methodology.favicon_clustering: MurmurHash3 (mmh3) of favicon bytes — identical hash = identical favicon = same operator
methodology.server_fingerprinting: SHA256 of (Server header + X-Powered-By + ETag pattern), truncated to 12 hex chars

dataset_summary.note_scan_phases: active_responded and dead counts reflect the merged two-pass scan (garbage_5s.jsonl + all_missing_results.jsonl → final_garbage.jsonl). cloudflare_fronted and namesilo_self_parked counts are from the complete merged dataset.

evidence_files.description: Input domain list (3,397,413 Namesilo domains with DNS)
Complete scan results — non-dead records (1,129,114 domains)
Source CSV — complete Namesilo registrar dump (5,269,357 domains)
